task_completion.description: Open and read the network topology specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal (cat/less), or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/network_topology_spec.md'.

task_completion.description: Log into the Rancher web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to 'https://localhost' showing the Rancher login screen or the main Rancher dashboard after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target namespace in Rancher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Rancher UI showing the cluster explorer with the 'online-banking' namespace selected or filtered.

task_completion.description: Access the Network Policies section in the Rancher UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Network Policies' page open in the Rancher UI (typically found under the 'Network' or 'Service Discovery' menu).

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of zero-trust NetworkPolicies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Network Policy creation form in Rancher being filled out, or a list showing newly created policies (like a default-deny policy) in the 'online-banking' namespace.

task_completion.description: Configure specific ingress and egress rules to enforce documented traffic flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for specific Ingress and Egress rules being defined in the Rancher UI, showing target pod selectors, allowed namespaces, or specific ports matching a topology specification.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Rancher UI as instructed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active use of a web browser navigating the Rancher interface, rather than exclusively using 'kubectl' commands in the terminal to apply policies.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the provided specification file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual confirmation that '/home/ga/Desktop/network_topology_spec.md' was opened and read, ensuring the agent didn't hallucinate or use pre-programmed rules.

integrity.description: Verify that the policies were actually applied to the cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the policies being saved/created in the Rancher UI or verified via terminal output, rather than just being typed into a text editor as YAML without being applied.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'online-banking'. Network topology specification file: '/home/ga/Desktop/network_topology_spec.md'. The agent must implement zero-trust NetworkPolicies in this namespace. Passing threshold is 70 points.
